title: Hud's custom items
body:
### !!WARNING!!
This plugin needs **protocol lib** to function you can download the latest version of it here: [https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/).

Create custom items quickly using simple commands or configuration options. Our system is designed to minimize setup time while still allowing deep customization.

Our plugin includes over 100 preset attributes that allow you to add powerful mechanics to items without writing a single line of code.

You can enchant any item up to level 255 through commands.

### Preset attribute examples:
- Custom tool types (including hybrid tools)
- Multi-block mining (3×3, 3×3×3, etc.)
- Custom abilities
- Player buffs and effects
- Special item mechanics
- Utility features such as auto-sell or item collection
- Custom durability systems

### Possible item examples:
- Mining drills
- Custom weapons
- Utility tools
- Economy tools
- Ability-based items

Our plugin can be fully used with in-game commands being super simple to create, edit, identify, list, remove, and give items.

This plugin might have bugs please report them [here](https://github.com/hudsonhds/hudscustomitems/issues).

### FAQ:

**Q:** Who is this plugin for?

A: This plugin was made for server owners who aren't experianced in coding and want a simple way to create custom items. 


**Q:** Do I need any dependencies?

A: The only dependancy you need is [protocollib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)


**Q:** What Minecraft versions are supported?

A: This plugin is for all 1.21.x paper/spigot/bukkit/purpur servers.

**Q:** Do I need to edit configuration files to create items?

A: You do not need to mess with any code to get amazing custom items as most of the core features can be done with in-game commands.


**Q:** Can items have multiple abilities?

A: Yes, you can have many abilities on a single item

WIKI is still a work in progress and you can help expand it right now:
[https://huds-custom-items.fandom.com/](https://huds-custom-items.fandom.com/)
